title: The Agent Said It Checked
hook: "Verified" is a sentence, not a fact. A security migration passed its audit while production was broken — and the discipline that came out of it caught three more false claims building this very series.
for: Anyone who has accepted an AI's (or a doc's, or their own) claim that something was checked.
get: The circular-audit failure mode, a prod-broke-twice case study peeled layer by layer, and the re-derivation discipline with its real budget.
do: Ask "checked how?" — then run that check yourself: grep the file, run the command, end at the runtime.
previewAlt: Demo 07 title slide with a claim-versus-runtime-check exhibit
